args.query: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE Id = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR';

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, FirstName, LastName, Email, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE Id = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR';

args.query:
SELECT DISTINCT Product2.Id as ProductId
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
JOIN Product2 ON REPLACE(Product2.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oi.Product2Id,'#','')
WHERE REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = REPLACE('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX','#','')
  AND date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2021-06-01') AND date('2021-06-30')
  AND lower(Product2.Name) LIKE '%ai%'
  AND (lower(Product2.Name) LIKE '%processing%' OR lower(Product2.Name) LIKE '%processor%' OR lower(Product2.Name) LIKE '%unit%');

exec_args.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Product2.Id as ProductId
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
JOIN Product2 ON REPLACE(Product2.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oi.Product2Id,'#','')
WHERE REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = REPLACE('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX','#','')
  AND date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2021-06-01') AND date('2021-06-30')
  AND lower(Product2.Name) LIKE '%ai%'
  AND (lower(Product2.Name) LIKE '%processing%' OR lower(Product2.Name) LIKE '%processor%' OR lower(Product2.Name) LIKE '%unit%');

args.query:
SELECT Product2.Id as ProductId, Product2.Name as ProductName, o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
JOIN Product2 ON REPLACE(Product2.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oi.Product2Id,'#','')
WHERE REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = REPLACE('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX','#','')
  AND date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2021-06-01') AND date('2021-06-30');

exec_args.sql:
SELECT Product2.Id as ProductId, Product2.Name as ProductName, o.Id as OrderId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON REPLACE(oi.OrderId,'#','') = REPLACE(o.Id,'#','')
JOIN Product2 ON REPLACE(Product2.Id,'#','') = REPLACE(oi.Product2Id,'#','')
WHERE REPLACE(o.AccountId,'#','') = REPLACE('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX','#','')
  AND date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2021-06-01') AND date('2021-06-30');
